title: simira alba
intro: Simira alba, also known as the white simira or white simarouba, is a plant species belonging to the family Simaroubaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Simira alba include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin problems such as eczema and acne. Simira alba can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its bark and leaves are often used in traditional medicine.
